.status-bar.background: rgb(17, 17, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(17, 17, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) no-repeat scroll 100% 3.6px / 11.88px padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("app://obsidian.md/public/images/6155340132a851f6089e.svg") no-repeat scroll 100% 3.6px / 11.88px padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(28, 28, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.background: rgb(75, 70, 124) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(75, 70, 124) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(17, 17, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(135, 232, 206) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
